extendedQueries.sql: SELECT organizations.id, organizations.name, organizations.slug, organizations.plan, organizations.settings, organizations."createdAt", organizations."updatedAt" FROM organizations organizations WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM projects projects_0 WHERE projects_0."organizationId" = organizations.id AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tasks tasks_1 WHERE tasks_1."projectId" = projects_0.id AND tasks_1.status = ?)) ORDER BY organizations.id ASC

prismaQueries.sql: SELECT `main`.`organizations`.`id`, `main`.`organizations`.`name`, `main`.`organizations`.`slug`, `main`.`organizations`.`plan`, `main`.`organizations`.`settings`, `main`.`organizations`.`createdAt`, `main`.`organizations`.`updatedAt` FROM `main`.`organizations` WHERE EXISTS(SELECT `t0`.`organizationId` FROM `main`.`projects` AS `t0` WHERE (EXISTS(SELECT `t1`.`projectId` FROM `main`.`tasks` AS `t1` WHERE (`t1`.`status` = ? AND (`t0`.`id`) = (`t1`.`projectId`) AND `t1`.`projectId` IS NOT NULL)) AND (`main`.`organizations`.`id`) = (`t0`.`organizationId`) AND `t0`.`organizationId` IS NOT NULL)) ORDER BY `main`.`organizations`.`id` ASC LIMIT ? OFFSET ?
